title: Banquet Management Dashboard
description: Get a real-time overview of bookings, leads, revenue, and venue performance — your command center for banquet hall operations.
alt: Banquet management software dashboard with bookings, leads, and revenue analytics

title: Team & Access Management
description: Create team members with role-based permissions so every staff member sees only what they need in your banquet management system.
alt: Banquet management software team and role-based access management dashboard

title: Muhurat & Premium Date Management
description: Mark auspicious wedding dates (muhurat) on your calendar — plan capacity, pricing, and bookings around India's most sought-after celebration days.
alt: Banquet management software muhurat and premium wedding date calendar

title: Banquet CRM & Lead Management
description: Capture inquiries, track follow-ups, log customer interactions, and manage your sales pipeline with an integrated banquet CRM system.
alt: Banquet CRM software lead management and customer follow-up dashboard

title: Banquet Booking Management
description: Manage event bookings from inquiry to confirmation. Track booking status, event details, payment history, and generate downloadable reports with ease.
alt: Banquet booking management dashboard showing event bookings and status tracking

title: Banquet Booking Calendar
description: View all bookings, leads, and event schedules in a centralized calendar. Easily identify available dates, avoid double bookings, and manage venue availability.
alt: Banquet booking calendar showing event schedules and venue availability

title: Banquet Vendor Management
description: Manage catering and additional service vendors — track vendor ledgers, PO credits, payment debits, and balance payable from one dashboard.
alt: Banquet vendor management dashboard with ledger and payment tracking

title: Banquet Reports & Business Analytics
description: Monitor venue performance, booking trends, revenue, pending dues, and customer activity through powerful reporting and analytics tools.
alt: Banquet management software reports and analytics dashboard

title: Banquet Expense Management
description: Track venue costs, approvals, and cashflow — from event-day spends to monthly overheads with full visibility in your banquet management software.
alt: Banquet expense management dashboard for venue cost tracking
